items.name: PropMode
items.signature: pub(crate) enum PropMode { In, InOut, Out }

items.name: Prop
items.signature: pub(crate) struct Prop { pub(crate) mode: PropMode, pub(crate) ty: String, pub(crate) name: String, pub(crate) default: String, pub(crate) desc: String }

items.name: Cb
items.signature: pub(crate) struct Cb   { pub(crate) name: String, pub(crate) args: String, pub(crate) desc: String }

items.name: Field
items.signature: pub(crate) struct Field { pub(crate) name: String, pub(crate) ty: String }

items.name: Item
items.doc: Parsed Slint component or struct item.

items.name: SLINT_EXT
items.doc: File extension for Slint source files.
